title: Create Empire
description: Modpack where the limits are only as finite as your imagination.
body:
![Create empire](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/709d72f25fa95febc3a3d80864e451bf174ef177.png)

A Minecraft modpack that redefines the boundaries of creativity, automation, and immersive gameplay. Embark on a journey where you're not just playing within UIs, but challenged to build contraptions of animated components, all guided by the in-game documentation provided by the Create mod.

Embark on your journey to build, automate, and explore the Create Empire modpack. The limits are only as finite as your imagination.

Join the Create Empire server at play.triibu.tech
---
Create Empire mods:

**Create Mod:**\ Welcome to a world of Building, Decoration, and Aesthetic Automation. Create offers an array of tools and blocks, leaving the player with design choices. Animated components working in various arrangements make for a unique gameplay experience. Let Ponder guide you through the added mechanics and gadgets. ![Minecraft with water wheels, cogwheels, mechanical presses and mixers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FUQ1C6qv/images/9fcfb4b3c86823b4ed9933e8009e8eb90a4038ee.png) --- **Seasons:**\ Experience the 4 seasons in Minecraft with its beautiful scenery and a more complex farming system. --- **Create: Steam 'n' Rails:**\ Transform your railway system into an extensive and aesthetic integration with Create: Steam 'n' Rails. Decorate your builds with new rail types, create grade crossings, and enhance your train yards with Semaphore blocks. Construct cute conductors, enjoy crafting on the move with the Workbench Cart, and summon trains with conductor whistles. Your railway empire is about to reach new heights. --- **Applied Energistics 2:**\ Explore a futuristic inventory management system with AE2. Revolutionizing storage, auto-crafting and networking AE2 adds complexity and depth to tech gameplay. Store entire regions in spatial storage, utilize unique resources, and master the art of creating large-scale, efficient systems. For those who love automation and resource management, AE2 is the key to technological prowess. --- **CC: Tweaked:**\ Bring programming to life in Minecraft with CC: Tweaked, a modern fork of ComputerCraft. Write Lua scripts to control in-game computers, automate machinery, manage networks, or even build games within the game. Whether you're creating password-protected doors, data-logging machines, or fully functional operating systems, CC: Tweaked empowers your technical creativity. --- Get this modpack and play on the Create Empire server. ### **Important!** - You require this modpack to play on the Create Empire server. - You need 4GB of memory for optimal gameplay. - If you have any trouble ask on [discord.](https://discord.gg/dFt9rVD7sz)
